meta.title: Go Dikela Divideo - Dikela Divideo tsa Instagram, YouTube & Facebook
meta.description: Dikela divideo go tswa Instagram, YouTube le Facebook mahala. Ga go na app e e hlokafalang. Ka bonako le ka bonolo.

hero.badge: Mahala • Ga go Tsena • Ga go App
hero.title: Sedikeli sa Divideo tsa Instagram & Facebook
hero.subtitle: Dikela Instagram Reels, Facebook le YouTube divideo ka bonako. Mahala, ka bonako, ga go na app e e hlokafalang.
hero.placeholder: Baya mona kgolagano ya video ya gago...

howto.title: Tsela ya go Dikela Divideo
howto.step1_desc: Bula Instagram, YouTube kgotsa Facebook o kopitse kgolagano ya video.
howto.step2_desc: Baya kgolagano mo lebokosong le ka godimo o kgotle konopo ya go Dikela.
howto.step3_desc: Tlhopha boleng jo o bo batlang o boloke video mo seetseng sa gago.

result.title: Video ya Gago e Itokisitse!
result.error: E tlholegelwa ke go bona video. Ke kopa o leke gape.
result.invalid_url: Ke kopa o tseye kgolagano e e nepagetseng ya Instagram, TikTok, Facebook kgotsa YouTube.

faq.title: Dipotso tse di Botswang Gantsi
faq.q1: A sediriswa seno ke sa mahala?
faq.a1: Ee, mahala gotlhe. Ga go na ngodiso kgotsa app e e hlokafalang.
faq.q2: Ke maphata afe a a tshegetswang?
faq.a2: Instagram (Reels, Dikwalo, Stories), YouTube (Divideo, Shorts), le Facebook (Divideo, Reels).
faq.a3: Ee. Ga re boloke dikgolagano tsa gago kgotsa divideo. Tsotlhe di dirwa ka nako ya nnete.
faq.q4: A nka dikela divideo tsa sephiri?
faq.a4: Nnyaa. Divideo tsa sechaba fela di ka dikelwa.

trending.title: Divideo tse di Kwa Godimo Beke Eno
trending.subtitle: Kgotle go bona mo YouTube • kopitsa kgolagano go dikela

footer.tagline: Go dikela divideo ka bonako le mahala go tswa mo maphateng a o a ratang.
footer.disclaimer: Sediriswa seno ke sa tiriso ya motho ka nonofo fela. Ke kopa o tlhomphe melao ya ditshwanelo.
